misc.title: #ONEPIECE1182 Imu ring> eye symbole Zaza ring> water symbole Luffy true awakening will gain him a ring with sun/fire symbole too. Every God probably has his own unique ring.
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1182 Imu ring> eye symbole Zaza ring> water symbole Luffy true awakening will gain him a ring with sun/fire symbole too. Every God probably has his own unique ring.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1182 It seems that every “GOD” has their own unique musical rhythm. The rhythm of ☀️ Sun God Nika (Monkey D. Luffy's heartbeat in Gear 5), known as the “Drums of Liberation,” is: “ドッドットット” 🎵
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1182 It seems that every “GOD” has their own unique musical rhythm. The rhythm of ☀️ Sun God Nika (Monkey D. Luffy's heartbeat in Gear 5), known as the “Drums of Liberation,” is: “ドッドットット” 🎵🎶 (DODDOTTOTTO 🎵🎶) Meanwhile, in the latest chapter, the rhythm of 🌧️Rain God Zaza is: “ドンチャンシャンシャン” 🎵🎶 (DONCHANSHANSHAN 🎵🎶) This SFX is a combination of “DONCHAN,” the sound of merrymaking or a festive atmosphere, and “SHANSHAN,” the Japanese onomatopoeia for jingling sounds. Could this be the musical counterpart to the “Drums of Liberation” 🥁 of Sun God Nika? If you look closely at Zaza’s aura ring and hat, there seem to be chimes or bells attached to them. “The Bell/Chime of Liberation,” perhaps?! 👀☕️
